experiments.purpose: Probe the capability-lift pattern's recipe, super-protocol unification options (A refinement, B parameterized Carrier<Underlying>, C both), API broadening at four levels, and limits (generic Underlying, ~Copyable Underlying, existentials). Six variants V0–V5.
experiments.statusDetail: V0 Cardinal baseline, V1 Ordinal baseline with refinement, V2 super-protocol via refinement, V3 super-protocol via SE-0346 parameterization, V4 API broadening at four levels, V5 limits (three sub-cases catalogued). Moved from swift-institute/Experiments/ on 2026-04-24 when swift-carrier-primitives was created.

narrativeSections.heading: Provenance
narrativeSections.body: This experiment was authored in swift-institute/Experiments/ on 2026-04-22 and moved to this package on 2026-04-24. See Research/capability-lift-pattern.md §Methodology for variant verdicts.
